# User curated premium video hero skill set - Overview

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: coding education hero, technical bootcamp landing page, career-ready curriculum hero, engineering learning product, developer portfolio landing page, technical HLS video background
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

Visual traits:
- HLS video background at reduced opacity
- dark left gradient and bottom-up gradient
- desktop vertical grid lines
- central SVG ellipse glow
- floating 200px glass info card
- large uppercase technical headline
- single accent punctuation
- serif italic emphasis

Use when:
- coding education hero
- technical bootcamp landing page
- career-ready curriculum hero
- engineering learning product
- developer portfolio landing page
- technical HLS video background

Avoid when:
- non-technical lifestyle homepage
- simple MP4 hero where HLS is unnecessary
- dense app dashboard
- grid lines that create visual noise
- glow placed over readable text
- HLS without fallback or native support check

AI summary: Technical education HLS hero for coding bootcamp, developer curriculum, engineering learning, and career-ready course landing pages. Uses hls.js/native HLS/MP4 fallback, video opacity around 60%, dark directional gradients, desktop vertical grid overlay, SVG ellipse glow, floating 200px glass info card, uppercase headline, serif accent, and single accent punctuation.

source_name: User curated premium video hero skill set
content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Layout Rules

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: coding education hero, technical bootcamp landing page, career-ready curriculum hero, engineering learning product, developer portfolio landing page, technical HLS video background
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Use HLS video background for technical education or engineering learning products.
- Use video opacity around 60% when text needs stronger readability.
- Use dark left gradient for left-side text and bottom-up gradient for bottom content.
- Place vertical grid lines at 25%, 50%, and 75% with opacity around white/10 on desktop.
- Use SVG ellipse glow with Gaussian blur around 20px to 40px behind content, not over text.
- Use a floating glass info card around 200px by 200px above the headline, optionally shifted with translate-y-[-50px].
- Use one accent punctuation, symbol, or keyword instead of full-line gradient headline.

AI summary: Technical education HLS hero for coding bootcamp, developer curriculum, engineering learning, and career-ready course landing pages. Uses hls.js/native HLS/MP4 fallback, video opacity around 60%, dark directional gradients, desktop vertical grid overlay, SVG ellipse glow, floating 200px glass info card, uppercase headline, serif accent, and single accent punctuation.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Interaction States

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: coding education hero, technical bootcamp landing page, career-ready curriculum hero, engineering learning product, developer portfolio landing page, technical HLS video background
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Use hls.js for .m3u8 when browser support requires it.
- Use native HLS when supported by the browser.
- Use MP4 fallback when provided.
- Use enableWorker:false in sandboxed preview environments if needed.
- Grid lines should remain stable and not become animated noise.
- SVG glow can fade subtly but must not reduce text readability.
- Reduced-motion mode should keep structure and use poster/fallback where appropriate.

AI summary: Technical education HLS hero for coding bootcamp, developer curriculum, engineering learning, and career-ready course landing pages. Uses hls.js/native HLS/MP4 fallback, video opacity around 60%, dark directional gradients, desktop vertical grid overlay, SVG ellipse glow, floating 200px glass info card, uppercase headline, serif accent, and single accent punctuation.

content:
# User curated premium video hero skill set - Accessibility Notes

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: coding education hero, technical bootcamp landing page, career-ready curriculum hero, engineering learning product, developer portfolio landing page, technical HLS video background
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- Do not rely only on one black transparent overlay; use directional gradients.
- Keep video motion behind text subdued.
- Ensure grid lines and glow do not reduce contrast.
- Provide non-video fallback or poster when HLS fails.
- Do not use video content as the only explanation of the product.
- Keep mobile layout simpler and reduce or hide desktop grid lines.

AI summary: Technical education HLS hero for coding bootcamp, developer curriculum, engineering learning, and career-ready course landing pages. Uses hls.js/native HLS/MP4 fallback, video opacity around 60%, dark directional gradients, desktop vertical grid overlay, SVG ellipse glow, floating 200px glass info card, uppercase headline, serif accent, and single accent punctuation.

# User curated premium video hero skill set - Implementation Hints

Page type: landing_page
Use cases: coding education hero, technical bootcamp landing page, career-ready curriculum hero, engineering learning product, developer portfolio landing page, technical HLS video background
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: local-file:D:/Downloads/codex_video_hero_layout_patterns_prompt.txt

- HLS: use hls.js for .m3u8, native HLS if browser canPlayType supports it, and MP4 fallback if available.
- In sandboxed environments, hls.js can use enableWorker:false for stability.
- Vertical grid lines at 25%, 50%, and 75% create engineering structure.
- SVG glow uses ellipse plus Gaussian blur around 20px to 40px, matching the accent color.
- Floating glass info card can show year, credibility, instructor proof, feature highlight, or product claim.
- Technical typography can use Inter Extra Bold headline, Plus Jakarta Sans eyebrow, and Instrument Serif italic for one emphasized word.

AI summary: Technical education HLS hero for coding bootcamp, developer curriculum, engineering learning, and career-ready course landing pages. Uses hls.js/native HLS/MP4 fallback, video opacity around 60%, dark directional gradients, desktop vertical grid overlay, SVG ellipse glow, floating 200px glass info card, uppercase headline, serif accent, and single accent punctuation.
